title: Status change automation - multi statuses selection using "or"

posts.author: ZivRaz (Ziv Raz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

When applying statuses, you have the option to define more than one as “completed”.
When applying an automation of “when status changes to XXX…” , It would be perfect to have the option to select more than one selection. something like:

“When status 1 changes to XXX or to YYY or to ZZZ” ,
followed by: “and only if status 2 is/isn’t AAA or BBB or CCC…”
Than…

If it exists and I missed it, I would appreciate a tip

Thanks
Ziv

posts.author: Kos (Kos)
posts.cookedHtml: I like this idea and would love to see it implemented soon!
